name: Number
description:
You get a free college tuition, but the catch is that everyone who applied has to have a little six-digit number imprinted somewhere on their body. That number, when entered into the inflation database, would instantly begin to inflate the owner until they burst. Keeping that number secret was super important.

[inflation, expansion and popping]

Found photo on google images.

This is based on a story by pop-palace called "The Number."
creator: bobibone
